title: viola × mulfordiae
intro: Viola × mulfordiae, also known as Mulford's violet, is a rare and hybrid species of flowering plant that belongs to the violet family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat various skin conditions such as eczema, acne, and dermatitis due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Viola × mulfordiae include its potential to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as tinctures, salves, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
